history.content:
<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B and I am facing right (`>`). The cell directly in front of me (C02) is lava (`L`), so I cannot move forward. To start moving towards the goal at H08, I need to go down the safe column B. To change my orientation from right to down, I need to turn clockwise (TURN_RIGHT).
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02, column B, facing down. The goal is at row 08, column H. The cell directly ahead (row 03, column B) is floor (`.`) and safe. Continuing down column B leads to row 06, which has safe passage rightwards. The immediate best move is to advance forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at cell B03 facing down (`v`). The goal is at H08. The path to the goal requires moving down along column B to row 06, then going right through row 6 (since C06 is safe), then down to row 7 and right to H07, then down to H08. The next immediate cell forward in my current direction is B04, which is a floor (`.`), so it is safe. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at cell (4, B) facing down. The cell directly in front of me is (5, B), which is a floor tile (`.`), safe to move into. My goal is to eventually reach (8, H). I can move forward now to start heading down toward row 6, where there is a safe corridor to the right.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 5, column B, facing down. The cell directly ahead (row 6, column B) is floor (`.`), which is safe. To eventually reach the goal at row 8, column H, I need to move downward first to leave the lava row (row 5). Moving forward is the correct immediate action.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 06 column B, facing down (`v`). The cell directly below me (row 07 column B) is lava (`L`), so moving forward is deadly. The only safe adjacent cell is to my right (row 06 column C, which is floor). To move there, I need to face right. From my current orientation facing down, turning left will point me to the right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06, column B, facing right (>). The cell ahead at (6,C) is floor (.) and safe. To reach the goal at (8,H), I need to move rightwards along row 6 until column F, then go down and right again. My immediate next step is to move forward into (6,C).
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06, column B, facing right. The goal is at row 08, column H. The safe path forward appears to be moving right along row 06 to column F, then moving down to row 07, then right to H07, and finally down to the goal. The immediate cell ahead, C06, is a floor cell (safe). So I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06, column D, facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08, column H. To reach it, I need to move downwards towards row 7, then move right to column H, and finally move down to row 8. My current orientation is right, so to move down I must first turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06, column D, facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 07, column D is a floor (`.`), safe to step on. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal, after which I will need to turn left to head right along row 7.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07, column D, facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 08, column H. To reach the goal, I need to move eastward along row 07 to column H, then move down. Since I am facing down, I need to turn left to face east.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07, column D, facing right (>). The goal is at row 08, column H. The cell directly ahead of me is (07, E), which is a floor cell (.). Moving forward is safe and will get me closer to the goal. I can continue moving right along row 07 to reach column H, then turn down to enter the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at 07E, facing right. The cell directly ahead is 07F, which is a floor cell. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal at 08H. My plan is to move to 07H, then turn right to face down, and move into the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07, column F, facing right (>). The cell directly ahead at G07 is floor (.), which is safe to move into. Moving forward will bring me one step closer to the goal at H08. I plan to continue right to H07, then turn down to reach the goal. There are no lava cells in my immediate forward path.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 07 column G facing right (>). The goal is at row 08 column H. Directly in front of me is cell (07, H), which is floor (safe). Moving there will allow me to then turn and move down to the goal. So my next action is MOVE_FORWARD.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07, column H, facing right (>). The goal is at row 08, column H, directly below me. To reach the goal, I need to face down. Turning right from my current orientation (right) will make me face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07, column H, facing down. The goal is at row 08, column H, directly in front of me. Moving forward will reach the goal safely.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
